core_responsibility.description: Advertisement integration plugin that bridges Google's Interactive Media Ads (IMA) SDK with the Kaltura Player, providing comprehensive client-side ad serving, rendering, and lifecycle management for video monetization

feature_ownership: Client-side ad request and VAST/VMAP response parsing via IMA SDK
Linear ad playback orchestration (pre-roll, mid-roll, post-roll)
Non-linear (overlay) ad rendering and display management
VPAID (Video Player-Ad Interface Definition) ad support
Ad pod management (sequential ad playback within breaks)
Ad skipping functionality and skip button timing
Companion ad selection and display coordination
Ad click-through handling and pause/resume behavior
Ad break cue points on seekbar/timeline
Ad state machine (loading, playing, paused, idle, done)
Middleware chain integration for player lifecycle (load, play, seek)
Engine decorator for video element state override during ads
OMID (Open Measurement Interface Definition) viewability tracking
Ad error handling and recovery (fatal vs. non-fatal errors)
data_handling: Ad break metadata (position, type, number of ads)
Ad metadata (duration, title, system, click-through URL, dimensions, bitrate)
Ad state transitions (loading → loaded → playing → completed/skipped)
Content playhead position tracking during ad playback
Player state snapshot (audio track, text track, playback rate) preservation across ad breaks
Ad container DOM element lifecycle and visibility
IMA SDK settings and rendering configurations
Ad tag URL or VAST/VMAP response payload

services: Ad server (via adTagUrl configuration) - provides VAST/VMAP responses
Google IMA SDK (imasdk.googleapis.com) - dynamically loaded if not present

consumers: Kaltura Player (kaltura-player-js) - consumes this plugin via plugin registration
Player UI components - receive ad events (AD_STARTED, AD_PAUSED, AD_PROGRESS, etc.) for UI updates
Analytics plugins - track ad impressions, quartiles, and completion events
Timeline/seekbar plugins (playkit-timeline) - display ad cue points

third_party_sdks: Google IMA SDK for HTML5 (ima3.js) - core ad serving and rendering
OMID API (via IMA SDK) - ad viewability measurement
kaltura_apis: PlayKit JS Plugin API - BasePlugin, registerPlugin
PlayKit JS Middleware API - IMiddlewareProvider, BaseMiddleware
PlayKit JS Engine Decorator API - IEngineDecoratorProvider, IEngineDecorator
PlayKit JS Ads Controller API - IAdsControllerProvider, IAdsPluginController
PlayKit JS Event System - player events, ad events, FakeEvent

runtime_dependencies: Google IMA SDK (dynamically loaded at runtime)

entry_points.main_entry: src/index.js - plugin registration with Kaltura Player
entry_points.core_logic: src/ima.js - primary plugin class extending BasePlugin (1300+ lines)
entry_points.state_management: src/ima-state-machine.js - finite state machine for ad lifecycle transitions
entry_points.middleware: src/ima-middleware.js - intercepts player load/play operations for ad insertion
entry_points.engine_decorator: src/ima-engine-decorator.js - overrides video element properties during ad playback
entry_points.ads_controller: src/ima-ads-controller.js - public API for ad control (skip, playAdNow, etc.)

common_error_patterns: VAST error code [0-9]+ - ad server or VAST parsing errors
AdsManager null/undefined - IMA SDK initialization failures
Ad tag URL request timed out - network issues with ad server
Unable to play ad - playback errors (often mobile autoplay restrictions)
VPAID ad rendering issues - complex interactive ad failures
Content video not resuming after ad break - state machine transition errors
Ad clicks opening multiple tabs - click handling race conditions
Companion ads not displaying - size mismatch or DOM timing issues
Ads not playing on iOS - autoplay policy or video tag configuration
Postroll not playing - content completion detection failures
